name: platform-parity
description: Platform-foundation P1 smoke suite — the packaged exe's honesty contract (Qualia spec/PLATFORM-PARITY.md). Structural assertions against the desktop runtime: runtime + boot-adapter identity (no phantom HTTP adapter), startup-content parity (shipped 63-node sample, not the inline toy), S-key/Snapshot gating, DebugRecorder honest no-op, dist demo availability, and the bind -> mutate -> Ctrl+S -> rebind disk roundtrip incl. existence-only pointer refresh on a hash-less adapter. Run: canary run --workload qualia-desktop --suite platform-parity --headless. Tests share one exe boot and run in listed order (the roundtrip test rebinds the adapter, so it runs last).
